item.title: USB Drive Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverepair
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Repair Software
(Utilities)
USB Drive Repair Software easily retrieves lost, corrupted and damaged files from removable media drives. www.usbdriverepair.org refers recovery software that is for reviving deleted songs, music files etc from flash drive. Restoration program undelete logically corrupted files from hard disk without any prior technical assistance.

[read more]
item.description:
USB Drive Repair Software
(Utilities)
USB Drive Repair Software easily retrieves lost, corrupted and damaged files from removable media drives. www.usbdriverepair.org refers recovery software that is for reviving deleted songs, music files etc from flash drive. Restoration program undelete logically corrupted files from hard disk without any prior technical assistance.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
USB Drive Repair Software
(Utilities)
USB Drive Repair Software easily retrieves lost, corrupted and damaged files from removable media drives. www.usbdriverepair.org refers recovery software that is for reviving deleted songs, music files etc from flash drive. Restoration program undelete logically corrupted files from hard disk without any prior technical assistance.

[read more]

item.title: Flash Card Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Flash Card Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Flash Card Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Flash Card Data Recovery Software is available on website www.usbflashdriverecovery.org that is highly capable and provide user-friendly or GUI environment to use by user for recovering and storing lost, missing, deleted, corrupted data from different mini SD storage device. With digital data recovery program any technical as well as non technical person can easily operate and no technical knowledge or training is required to work on tool for regaining various important data from different type of removable storage device. Flash drive file reviving tool is used to retrieve deleted or missing media files in different format like bmp, jpg, tiff, gif audio-video files like mp3, wav, mpeg etc without any requirement of technical assistance. Advance file recovery program is specialized and professional utility which offers to user for retrieving and storing lost data from memory cards within short time duration.

[read more]

Advance file recovery program is specialized and professional utility which offers to user for retrieving and storing lost data from memory cards within short time duration.

item.title: bash-pac [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: bash-pac [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: djmaxcz
item.itunes:summary:
bash-pac
(Arcade)
if you do not want to install the bash script click here https://onlinegdb.com/4wNEzIXxL
about the project
the bash-pac is clone of pacman that is writen in bash script.

if you want better expirience Install
pacman4console

Game Instructions
Player character: (C)

Avoid the ghost (G) while collecting food (.) to increase your score.

Controls:
A: Move Left, S Move Down, D Move Right, W move up

if you dont want opencode git here is github link
https://github.com/justmaxcz/bash-pac/tree/main
[read more]

item.title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST
GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[read more]

GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB

#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST

GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.

item.title: USB Drive Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverepair
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Innovative USB Drive Recovery Software effectively regain your misplaced data files, folders and documents from logically corrupted pen drive in major data loss situations such as accidentally formatted, data transfer from one device to another, virus/worm corrupted, software/hardware malfunctioning, improper device handling, power failure etc in brilliant way.

[read more]
item.description:

Innovative USB Drive Recovery Software effectively regain your misplaced data files, folders and documents from logically corrupted pen drive in major data loss situations such as accidentally formatted, data transfer from one device to another, virus/worm corrupted, software/hardware malfunctioning, improper device handling, power failure etc in brilliant way.

[read more]

item.title: USB Media Data Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Media Data Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverepair
item.itunes:summary:
USB Media Data Repair Software
(Utilities)
No need of technical skills to operate best USB Media Data Repair Software to restore missing songs, music files, text files, documents, movie folder from corrupted multimedia mobile phone. Powerful file rescue software is used to retrieve misplaced data due to drive formation within short time period at affordable cost. Advance data restoration application provides an option to preview files and folder before actual recovery process.

[read more]

item.title: Mobile Phone Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mobile Phone Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile Phone Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Mobile Phone Recovery Software is useful for retrieving logically corrupted digital picture, images, audio-video songs and other memorable data from cell phone device. Specialized file retrieval program provides attractive GUI interface so that user easily operate utility for recovering inaccessible files from virus infected mobile device.

[read more]
item.description:
Mobile Phone Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Mobile Phone Recovery Software is useful for retrieving logically corrupted digital picture, images, audio-video songs and other memorable data from cell phone device. Specialized file retrieval program provides attractive GUI interface so that user easily operate utility for recovering inaccessible files from virus infected mobile device.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Mobile Phone Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Mobile Phone Recovery Software is useful for retrieving logically corrupted digital picture, images, audio-video songs and other memorable data from cell phone device. Specialized file retrieval program provides attractive GUI interface so that user easily operate utility for recovering inaccessible files from virus infected mobile device.

item.title: Recover USB Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover USB Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: laptopsdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Recover USB Drive
(Utilities)
Flash drive data recovery tool retrieves data lost due to human errors, virus attacks, damaged file system, hardware malfunction, improper shutdown or any other type of failure. USB drive data recovery software restore deleted digital media files such as GIF, JPG, PNG, JPEG, BMP, WMV, MPEG, MP3, MP4 etc. Pen drive recovery tool rescue formatted document image snap retrieve audio video music songs pictures and also restore data from 1GB 2GB 4GB or even higher capacity drives on windows operating system. Thumb drive data recovery program recover deleted files from all type of USB memory sticks including Apacer, Kingmax, Lexar, PQI Ridata, Supermedia, Transcend, Kingston, Sony, Viking, and many more. Flash drive lost files recovery tool undelete erased pictures, digital clips, Power point (*.ppt), MS Word (*.doc), PDF, Excel (*.xls), Access (*.mdb), and text files etc. Lost data recovery tool undelete files from all type of USB drives like pen drive, Flash drive, Flash disk, Thumb drive, Zip drive, memory stick, USB key, magic stick, pocket drive, Geek stick etc. Recover USB drive application supports retrieval of unreadable encrypted data, and long file name files from any removable storage media.Features:* Pen drive files repairing software recovers accidentally deleted video or formatted audio songs, photos, images, digital pictures etc.* Freeware flash data retrieval program restore lost data, recover formatted files before you fix and repair your corrupted storage device.* Thumb drive music recovery tool provides data recovery even when folder deleted using Shift+ Del keys while accessing pen drive on your computer.* Thumb drive data retrieval utility recovers files and saves accordingly at user specified location on hard disk for further use.

[read more]
item.description:
Recover USB Drive
(Utilities)
Flash drive data recovery tool retrieves data lost due to human errors, virus attacks, damaged file system, hardware malfunction, improper shutdown or any other type of failure. USB drive data recovery software restore deleted digital media files such as GIF, JPG, PNG, JPEG, BMP, WMV, MPEG, MP3, MP4 etc. Pen drive recovery tool rescue formatted document image snap retrieve audio video music songs pictures and also restore data from 1GB 2GB 4GB or even higher capacity drives on windows operating system. Thumb drive data recovery program recover deleted files from all type of USB memory sticks including Apacer, Kingmax, Lexar, PQI Ridata, Supermedia, Transcend, Kingston, Sony, Viking, and many more. Flash drive lost files recovery tool undelete erased pictures, digital clips, Power point (*.ppt), MS Word (*.doc), PDF, Excel (*.xls), Access (*.mdb), and text files etc. Lost data recovery tool undelete files from all type of USB drives like pen drive, Flash drive, Flash disk, Thumb drive, Zip drive, memory stick, USB key, magic stick, pocket drive, Geek stick etc. Recover USB drive application supports retrieval of unreadable encrypted data, and long file name files from any removable storage media.Features:* Pen drive files repairing software recovers accidentally deleted video or formatted audio songs, photos, images, digital pictures etc.* Freeware flash data retrieval program restore lost data, recover formatted files before you fix and repair your corrupted storage device.* Thumb drive music recovery tool provides data recovery even when folder deleted using Shift+ Del keys while accessing pen drive on your computer.* Thumb drive data retrieval utility recovers files and saves accordingly at user specified location on hard disk for further use.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Recover USB Drive
(Utilities)
Flash drive data recovery tool retrieves data lost due to human errors, virus attacks, damaged file system, hardware malfunction, improper shutdown or any other type of failure. USB drive data recovery software restore deleted digital media files such as GIF, JPG, PNG, JPEG, BMP, WMV, MPEG, MP3, MP4 etc. Pen drive recovery tool rescue formatted document image snap retrieve audio video music songs pictures and also restore data from 1GB 2GB 4GB or even higher capacity drives on windows operating system. Thumb drive data recovery program recover deleted files from all type of USB memory sticks including Apacer, Kingmax, Lexar, PQI Ridata, Supermedia, Transcend, Kingston, Sony, Viking, and many more. Flash drive lost files recovery tool undelete erased pictures, digital clips, Power point (*.ppt), MS Word (*.doc), PDF, Excel (*.xls), Access (*.mdb), and text files etc. Lost data recovery tool undelete files from all type of USB drives like pen drive, Flash drive, Flash disk, Thumb drive, Zip drive, memory stick, USB key, magic stick, pocket drive, Geek stick etc. Recover USB drive application supports retrieval of unreadable encrypted data, and long file name files from any removable storage media.Features:* Pen drive files repairing software recovers accidentally deleted video or formatted audio songs, photos, images, digital pictures etc.* Freeware flash data retrieval program restore lost data, recover formatted files before you fix and repair your corrupted storage device.* Thumb drive music recovery tool provides data recovery even when folder deleted using Shift+ Del keys while accessing pen drive on your computer.* Thumb drive data retrieval utility recovers files and saves accordingly at user specified location on hard disk for further use.

item.title: Flash Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Flash Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Flash Drive Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Site www.usbflashdriverecovery.org presents Download Flash Drive Data Recovery program that supports most interactive graphical user interface for users in reviving damaged data such as audios, videos, photos, screenshots etc from any keychain lost due to software/hardware malfunctioning. USB data salvage tool get back lost images from formatted flash drive in fewer efforts required.

item.title: USB Pictures Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Pictures Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
USB Pictures Recovery
(Utilities)
USB Pictures Recovery application is used to retrieve corrupted digital photographs folder without need of any expert guidance from hard disk drive. User friendly and cost effective photo recovery tool is easily downloaded from website www.usbflashdriverecovery.org to retrieve formatted or deleted digital snapshots files folder in just few mouse clicks and supports all types of hard disk including ATA, SATA, IDE, EIDE, SCSI drives.

[read more]
